name: cuebook
description: Query Cuebook market intelligence or compile a creator-owned market viewpoint into a sourced editorial Frame.

interface.shortDescription: Query Cuebook or create a sourced editorial Frame
interface.longDescription: Cuebook has two public skills. Query searches, reads, compares, and explains source-linked market intelligence without writing. Create preserves and sharpens the user's viewpoint, asks at most one optional high-leverage question, and runs one bounded Cuebook-first evidence pass before returning one recommended Frame. The public Frame contains only a title, concise body, image reference, and alt text. Its mobile-first visual can express price or indexed curves, relative strength, drawdown and recovery, rolling correlation, event windows, thresholds, causal paths, evidence tension, conditional scenarios, transparent Creator Lenses, or long-short contributions. Observed history and unresolved future time remain visibly separate; causal hypotheses stay creator-owned, retrospective selection bias is disclosed, and no future price path is fabricated. Alternatives differ structurally, not merely by color. Workflow, evidence, hashes, upload, consent, and authorization state remain backstage. Publication happens only after explicit intent; withdrawal alone requires separate consent.
defaultPrompt: 查询 USO 最新叙事、市场状态和来源
比较 HOOD 与 COIN 的最新估值口径和市场表现
我觉得 BTC 未来 30 天会比现在高，帮我做成标题、正文和配图完整的 Frame
